title: Virgin Galactic Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Financial Results
text: Virgin Galactic successfully flew six human spaceflights in six months in 2023 and announced that Delta Class Spaceships are on track for ground and flight testing in 2025 and commercial service in 2026. The company achieved significant milestones including FAA approval for commercial flights and successful completion of two spaceflights from New Mexico, including the Unity 22 flight. Cash position remains strong, with cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities of $982 million as of December 31, 2023. Full year 2023 results showed a US$1.49 loss per share with a net loss of US$502.3 million. The results highlighted the company's progress toward commercial operations despite substantial pre-revenue losses, demonstrating investor confidence in the company's path to profitability.
